title: rv.ui_proof_request.v1
description: Request envelope passed to the UI proof runner (local Playwright or GHA-driven CI). Captures expected build + target so the runner can refuse to validate against a drifted artifact set.

run_id.description: UUID/string identifier set by the caller (NAS supervisor or CI orchestrator).

expected_commit.description: Git SHA the runner must observe on the target host before running checks.

base_url.description: Public URL of the candidate to validate (preview branch URL or rubikvault.com).

sample_set_id.description: Stable id of the asset sample so callers can verify the same set was used.
